boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Sending a test SMS message as shown in the Getting Started guide

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Developer sends a valid SMS message through Infobip API and receives a successful response
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: API response indicating message accepted and queued for delivery
documented_first_success.official_milestone: Successfully send a test SMS message using the Infobip REST API
documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The official Getting Started guide for developers shows sending a sample SMS message as the first concrete integration step and success milestone.

assumed_prior_state: Developer has access to Infobip API key
entry_point.developer_intent: Integrate Infobip messaging capabilities into existing systems via API.

friction_gates.description: Must have an active Infobip account to access API keys.
API key is required for authenticating API requests.

prerequisites.requirement: Developer must have an active Infobip account to access API keys and services.
Developer must have an API key assigned at signup to authenticate API requests.

primary_path.action: Access the Infobip developer getting started guide
details: Review the overview of API integration and developer tools
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Confusion or lack of clarity on next steps
primary_path.success_signal: Developer understands the API integration overview

primary_path.action: Obtain API key from Infobip account
details: Use API key management page to view or generate API keys
API key acts as access token for API calls
primary_path.failure_or_wait: No API key available or access denied
primary_path.success_signal: API key is available for use

primary_path.action: Review sample API request for sending SMS
details: Examine JSON payload example for sending SMS message
Note required fields: destinations, from, text
primary_path.success_signal: Developer can construct valid API request

primary_path.action: Send test SMS message via Infobip REST API
details: Send POST request with sample JSON payload
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Error response or no delivery confirmation
primary_path.input: API request with message payload and API key
primary_path.success_signal: Response indicates message accepted and queued

evidence_supported: Sample API request for sending SMS
sources.title: Infobip Documentation Hub

evidence_supported: First success milestone of sending test SMS
sources.title: Get started guide: Developers

alternatives_considered.name: Infobip Exchange Apps
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Exchange apps are for extending Infobip and integrating with new platforms but require prior API knowledge and account setup; the REST API is the fundamental integration surface.

alternatives_considered.name: Answers Web Interface
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: The Answers web interface is for building chatbots via UI, suitable for chatbot designers rather than developers integrating via API.

surface.name: REST API
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation and developer guides emphasize API integration as the primary method for developers to start using Infobip services, including messaging and chatbot building.
